hero.subtitle: Individual counseling, couples work, adolescent support, and psychedelic integration.
hero.note: A 15-minute intro to understand your request. I'll reply within 24 hours.

items.title: Anxiety, loss of meaning, life crises
items.desc: When old structures stop working, we rebuild inner clarity and a stable sense of direction.

items.title: Relationships, conflict, emotional distance
items.desc: We map repeating dynamics and restore dialogue without blame.

items.title: Support for adolescents and parents
items.desc: Support through identity shifts, boundaries, and high emotional tension at home.

items.title: Psychedelic integration
items.desc: Making sense of intense experiences and integrating insights into everyday life.

services.title: Services
services.subtitle: Each format is tailored to your request and life context.

items.title: Individual counseling
items.desc: Deep work with anxiety, difficult choices, and periods of disorientation.

items.title: Couples counseling
items.desc: A structured space to restore dialogue, respect, and clarity in relationships.

items.title: Adolescent counseling
items.desc: Support through identity development, emotional swings, and family conflict.

items.title: Psychedelic integration
items.desc: Grounding intense experiences and translating insight into practical change.

trust.title: Why clients trust me
trust.quote: For the first time in years, I could speak honestly about what was happening to me.

cta.body: If what you read resonates, write to me. Even just to start with a short intro.

blog.title: Blog
blog.subtitle: Essays to help you understand yourself in difficult periods.

items.title: Finding meaning in crisis
items.teaser: Practical orientation points when old foundations no longer work.

items.title: What anxiety is really saying
items.teaser: How to read persistent tension and respond with more precision.

items.title: After an intense experience: what next?
items.teaser: Integration steps without losing contact with everyday reality.

items.question: How long does one session take?
items.answer: A regular session takes 50 minutes. The first intro call is 15 minutes and free.

items.question: What is the consultation format?
items.answer: Online via Zoom, Google Meet, or messenger of your choice. Audio or video.

items.question: Do you work in English?
items.answer: Yes, sessions are available in Ukrainian and English. Select your language in the request form.

items.question: How quickly do you reply?
items.answer: I reply to all requests within 24 hours, often on the same day.

items.question: Are sessions confidential?
items.answer: Yes. Everything you share stays between us. Exceptions are described in the Privacy Policy.

items.question: Can I cancel a session?
items.answer: Yes, free cancellation is possible up to 24 hours before the session. Later cancellations are charged in full.

errors.nameLong: Name must be at most 60 characters

footer.about: A confidential online space for honest conversations about crisis, relationships, and meaning.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.description: How personal data is processed when you contact us through the site.

sections.title: What data is collected
sections.content: We only collect the data you voluntarily submit in the form: name, contact (email or Telegram), and message text.

sections.title: Purpose of processing
sections.content: Data is used solely to respond to your request, schedule consultations, and continue communication initiated by you.

sections.title: Legal basis
sections.content: Processing is based on your consent under Article 6(1)(a) GDPR and applicable Ukrainian personal data law.

sections.title: Retention period
sections.content: Data is retained for as long as needed to process your request or until consent is withdrawn / deletion is requested.

sections.title: Third-party services
sections.content: Cloudflare Turnstile may be used for form protection (necessary). Vercel Analytics is loaded only after your analytics consent.

sections.title: Your rights
sections.content: You may request access, correction, restriction, deletion, and withdrawal of consent at any time.

sections.title: Contact
sections.content: For data-related requests, contact us at {{email}}.

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.description: Terms for accessing the site and contacting through the request form.

sections.title: Website purpose
sections.content: This website is informational and does not replace medical care or emergency intervention.

sections.title: Form submissions
sections.content: By submitting the form, you confirm the accuracy of your information and agree to data processing under the Privacy Policy.

sections.title: Confidentiality
sections.content: Both parties commit to confidentiality within legal and professional ethical boundaries.

sections.title: Limitation of liability
sections.content: The site owner is not liable for technical outages, third-party service unavailability, or temporary response delays.

sections.title: Updates
sections.content: These terms may be updated. The latest version is always published on this page.

sections.title: Contacts
sections.content: For organizational questions, contact {{email}} or Telegram {{telegramHandle}}.
